PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $tmp='C:\\Users\\Admin\\AppData\\Local\\Temp'; if \(Test-Path "$tmp\\jre21"\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force "$tmp\\jre21" }; Expand-Archive -Path "$tmp\\jre21.zip" -DestinationPath "$tmp\\jre21" -Force; $j = Get-ChildItem -Path "$tmp\\jre21" -Recurse -Filter java.exe | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Output \("java: " + $j.FullName\))
